notes: South Africa Presidency OLD site (thepresidency.gov.za) via the Internet Archive. The current site was rebuilt for the 7th administration (2024-, JS/AJAX Drupal view listing) and its current speeches are on gov.za (zaf_gov), so this targets the PREVIOUS Drupal-7 presidency speech archive. CDX for thepresidency.gov.za/speeches = 42k+ captures; the ?page=N referrer variants archive the SAME speech many times, so link_pattern '/speeches/[^?]{12,}$' excludes queries -> 3975 distinct /speeches/<slug> articles. Probe --spread GREEN: title(h1)/date(.date-display-single, 'D Month YYYY') green; body .field-name-body (Drupal-7 single-dash) or the generic extractor. Covers Zuma (to 2018) + Ramaphosa as Deputy President then President (2014-2024) -> no speaker_default, tenure crosscheck. Complements zaf_gov.
